creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text:
These sources confirm MIT based on other notable distributions:
* OpenSUSE https://build.opensuse.org/package/view_file/openSUSE:Factory/xorgproto/xorgproto.spec?expand=1
* Gentoo https://packages.gentoo.org/packages/x11-base/xorg-proto
* Homebrew https://formulae.brew.sh/formula/xorgproto
* Debian https://salsa.debian.org/xorg-team/proto/xorgproto/-/blob/debian-unstable/debian/copyright
* NetBSD http://ftp.netbsd.org/pub/pkgsrc/current/pkgsrc/x11/xorgproto/README.html
* CentOS https://git.centos.org/rpms/xorg-x11-proto-devel/blob/c8/f/SPECS/xorg-x11-proto-devel.spec#_10
